description_long: This is a mid-century modern style cabinet with a rectangular form, featuring a natural wood frame and top surface. The front face is divided into three sections: two outer doors and a central column of three drawers, all with a muted green finish and small metallic handles. The sides and top display a wood grain texture, suggesting a veneer or solid wood construction. The cabinet stands on four angled wooden legs, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The back and interior are not visible, but the design implies internal shelving or compartments behind the doors. This piece is suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A mid-century modern cabinet with a wood frame, green front doors and drawers, and angled wooden legs. Features metallic handles and a natural wood grain top and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain white panel with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_2: Front view with green doors and three central drawers, each with a small metallic handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and depth.
